variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 18234 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 18234 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 18234 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 304.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 196.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 19.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 555.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 545.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 505.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26664 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18234
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF26664 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18234
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26664 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
